summary: Tested Procurement Reports tab addition to FinanceReportsHub. All frontend features working correctly. Fixed a backend bug where PO export returned 500 due to Workbook object not being serialized to bytes.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: /api/procurement/pos/export/xlsx was returning 500 — generate_po_summary_excel() returns a Workbook object, not bytes. Fixed in procurement.py by adding BytesIO serialization.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Procurement Reports tab fully working. 4 export cards: PR (200 OK), PO (200 OK — fixed), GR Summary (200 OK), Vendor Performance (200 OK). All filters present. Tab navigation working.
rca_of_issue: BUG: /api/procurement/pos/export/xlsx returned 500. Root cause: reports_excel_procurement_service.generate_po_summary_excel() returns an openpyxl Workbook object, but the endpoint passed it directly to fastapi Response(content=...) which calls content.encode() — Workbook has no encode method. Fix: added BytesIO buffer and wb.save(buf) to serialize to bytes before returning Response.
